Gestures in WebXR — Barrier Mage

  • 25 September 2021
  • webXR,
  • VR

Abstract

The game Barrier Mage implements gesture-based Virtual Reality game play. The user draws mystic symbols with 6-DOF VR controllers. Each symbol has a different effect. This novel game mechanic eliminates an abstraction layer usual in fantasy games, making this game more immersive.

Slides #

Drawing a symbol #

Root-mean-square #

( x 1 − x 2 ) 2 + ( y 1 − y 2 ) 2 + ( z 1 − z 2 ) 2 3

used to calculate difference between drawn endpoints & template endpoints

Barrier Mage basic play #
